reviews.review_description:
Ok. I just got a Quest for Christmas and this is my first blabbering review. This has been a game I have really been looking forward to! VR/MR are definitely the best place to evolve the Real Time Strategy genre! I have been a massive RTS fan since the original Command And Conquer, and it's only right that there is a revival of those sorts of games that can use your sofa as a mountain to have bases on and such! I noticed there are lots of Turn-Based strategy games but a lack of RTSs, so I'm already glad you guys have made this! 

Stepping in, I saw the mission map and immediately said out loud "this is what VR should be about" to my cat (who ignored me)!
I tried the first mission in Mixed reality and laughed with glee how it all integrated in. Though it took me far too long to find the enemy base, which was sneakily hiding under my Christmas tree like an unwanted and ominously sinister leftover present...it seems that the room scan struggles to recognise my tree in a helpful way, and some of my sofas, so I'll have to adjust that a bit and come back to it.
I played the next 2 missions in VR mode, which is cool because it gives you a proper narrative map and working inclines and mountain ranges and such. I might play through on VR and then replay on MR after! I know I haven't played it all but I love this already! So nostalgic and simplified yet engaging mechanics to be accessible and fun! Units look cool and attack each other in a bombastic way. You feel like a commander on some high-tech map. Great C&C nods especially even with it being Yellow vs Red! The dialogue is really good too and brings a nostalgia to it. Got some funny humour too! Unit/structure placement is intuitive as well as implementation for the left and right hand!  A solid amount of missions, a nice little basic storyline with different characters! The elevators are cool! And when my bomber took out half the enemy base I involuntarily cried out "yeehaw!"! Please, people, if you've  tolerated this blabber review, support this game and games like it! The devs have clearly put a lot of hard work in to it and it is refreshing and what's needed with VR! It might seem basic but has a lot of heart and a whole lot of potential moving forward! I'm excited to see what the devs continue to do! And this is really fun already! (I had to stop playing because I accidentally had my headset on too tight and started losing the blood to my brain. Ha

Dev notes (I'm that annoying constructive feedback dude)...it might not be doable and I get restrictions, but would be cool if the units could have a vocal response to selecting and sending them out, like a "scout reporting" sort of thing. Sometimes i wasn't sure if I'd selected the unit or not with the beeps. Also would be cool if you could put veterency in to the units to make it worth caring for them more, and maybe elevation superiority for placement tactics and such? Maybe a few more different units or upgrades for existing units, or even different units for each side? I know might be a lot of asks, and i get limitations, but maybe if some of those could be added would really set it off? But hey, this is awesome already and I'm loving my time with it! Thank you for making this and i hope you keep going and i look forward to what you do going forward and hopefully inspiring other similar games!
Waffling over.
Commander signing out

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for this review! We're so glad you are enjoying the game! Feedback is always appreciated - on the unit barks, we actually have our audio director sourcing actors to add this in for a major patch in the future! Veterancy and other tweaks are under discussion, but will depend on a few other things we are doing with the gameplay. More units and better factions is definitely in the plan - stay tuned! If you want to more directly help us out, feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa)

reviews.review_description:
Diving into Crystal Commanders is like stepping into a strategist's dream where your living room becomes a miniature battleground.
Setting up your bases on your coffee table, sending tanks behind the sofa, or deploying turrets on your desk—it's fun, action-packed, and incredibly immersive.
The game gently guides you through fifteen well-paced missions.
Perfect for getting started before launching into real 1v1 or multiplayer battles.
The creative mode is a great idea: you can freely test your tactics without pressure.
The VR controls (placing units, accessing menus via joystick, etc.) are intuitive.
In MIXED REALITY, the virtual environments seamlessly integrate into your room. The idea of ​​pushing a drone to the living room lamp to launch an attack remains magical.
If you're looking for a fun introduction to VR RTS games, Crystal Commanders is an excellent choice.

developer_response.body: So glad to hear you're loving the game! Especially happy that the controls are working well - we spent a lot of time refining them!

reviews.review_title: Fun RTS game and perfect for VR!
reviews.review_description:
This game is enjoyable, and anyone who appreciates RTS will undoubtedly enjoy it, as the functionality is very easy to learn.

Also the experience of flying over the combat zone is fantastic and fully utilises VR technology.

Would be nice to have:
1. Construct a map featuring water and islands, and develop new military units, including ships.
2. Develop a new research building that allows the upgrading of weapons.
3. Goes without saying.... have the option for a Super Weapon!

Minor Issues:
1. If you have already selected a military unit and decide to create a new one, the selected unit will move in the same direction but at a greater distance when you choose the target location for the new unit's creation. It would be beneficial to have all units unselected when opting to create a new one.
2. The reminders in the popup messages could be more effectively positioned at the side of the screen; at times, they obstruct an ongoing battle.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! Glad you're liking the game, and we really appreciate the feedback! We're working on some major updates and new things that we hope you'll really like for later this year.

reviews.review_description:
The developers are racist, they portray blonde people as dumb and annoying.
Got bored after 5 missions

reviews.review_title: Tiny tanks & flying ships in your room!
reviews.review_description: This. Game. Is. AWESOME! I love almost everything about this game. The dialog, the units, the combat, the ability to build a base in your frickin living room! The game, as is, is a lot of fun with only a few quirks that I'm sure are being worked on. The 2 worst offenders are: resource collectors flying way too high to get to a crystal deposit and enemies being placed behind furniture. Aside from that, it's an absolute blast! I hope more campaigns will be released in the near future...and hopefully also with a difficulty setting since the default is a little too easy sometimes.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, and so glad you find the MR mode fun! We're always working to improve the MR gameplay, thanks for the feedback! We've been focused on multiplayer updates lately (such as matchmaking), but would love to do more single player content someday as well! Another AI difficulty mode is planned for the next update though - feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) for the latest!

reviews.review_title: Fun little strategy base building game
reviews.review_description: There's not much more to say.  If you enjoy real-time strategy games with a story, good mechanics, and music, this is your game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! So glad you're liking the game - feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) if you'd like to help with feedback, playtests, and new feature ideas!

reviews.review_title: Best use of MR ever seen!
reviews.review_description:
This is the coolest use of MR I've seen to date on the Quest 3. It actually feels like you're commanding a small army in your living room.
Campaign has good variety and an interesting story.
AI is pretty solid and playing online with a friend is a blast.
RTS features are a bit simple but that makes it easier to play with friends/family that aren't hardcore gamers.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review and glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_title: Very good if not best, rts on quest
reviews.review_description:
I really like this game, i was looking for RTS 
experience on quest and by accident stumbled upon this beauty. I really enjoy moving my armies around my room and i think this is a great example how MR can be used. I do not use VR environment in this game so cannot comment on it and glad that this game is being still developed and polish. Already it is a very good product and i strongly believe that with time this will be even better

developer_response.body: So awesome that you found our game and decided to check it out! It's great to hear you're loving the MR! Feel free to come join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) if you'd like to get the latest info on updates and more!

reviews.review_description: Great MR game. Nicely done solo and multiplayer. Great tutorial.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, and really happy to hear you enjoyed the gameplay and tutorial! We spent a lot of time trying to make sure it was clear!

reviews.review_description: The game is really good, we have a dynamic and functional system of combat, so many strategies but the matchmaking is does not working to me, I can’t find a opponent. It’s the only thing I missed

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying the game! We're aware the matchmaking pools are pretty low now, unfortunately. We do have an LFG channel in our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) that can be helpful, and are also planning on adding a lobby system soon that folks can chill in to help with hanging out to find a match!

reviews.review_description:
First let me point out I pre ordered as I was really waiting for a game like this in mixed reality, this is because I grew up with c&c, earth, aoe list goes on.
I am actually surprised how technical well it released of course there is lack in terms of buildings, air vehicles but stuff shall come according to devs.
But, I also must say the AI and multiselecting units especially for aircraft, actually for aircraft theres none, needs work.

developer_response.body:
We actually met about this issue yesterday (air unit multiselecting) and plan to add it into the game in a patch soon! Feel free to join the Discord to provide more feedback: https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa

We will also add additional AI difficulty levels in a future patch!

reviews.review_description:
This game is simply put..awesome!

The developers have produced a unique, fun and engaging RTS experience that immerses you in a world that reminds me of my nostalgic childhood playing classics like Command & Conquer.

However it clearly brings more to the table with smooth and polished gameplay in MR or XR - whichever you fancy!

I am simply blown away by the sheer amount of game modes available at this price point too!

Local MR with a friend in your living room?! Sure!

Battle the AI in a fully fledged campaign spanning multiple stages? Done!

Creative mode where you can try everything out and test your favourite way to setup your base?!? Definitely!

And more! 

My favourite way to play was against a friend remotely in VR in this cool thematic social space as if we were in the same room and race each other to victory in the Capture the Flag  style game mode!

I highly recommend this title to everyone! ❤️

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words, and so glad you're enjoying the game! Even more content to come!

reviews.review_title: A solid step for RTS in MR
reviews.review_description: I grew up playing up a lot of RTS and tactics games so was excited to get back to those roots a bit. This game scratched that RTS itch for me. It's not super in depth on mechanics or complexity but those core elements of the genre are there and I'm digging it. It also uses the MR component as a part of the gameplay map rather than being just a gimmick wish is an issue I have with MR often. Setting up a base on my desk and getting attacked by enemies from my bookshelf is just a fun time.

developer_response.body: Awesome to hear you're enjoying the MR mode! It's such a cool way to play!

reviews.review_description:
Crystal commanders does a very good job at filling that VR RTS shaped hole in the market.

The game acts as a perfect entry to the genre with all the staples of the genre (base building,resource finding, defense and attack) without overwhelming newcomers to the genre with too much at the start.

But don't let this put off you C+C/Starcraft players. The game features a 3 Act campaign to playthrough as well as multiplayer (currently 3 mode types with another to come in an update)

As a VR RTS it plays around with the idea of elevations a lot as well as offering MR modes for those wanting to see the units exploring their real life environment.

It is very promising start to an under represented genre in VR.
I can't wait to see where the team go when it comes to updates.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review - we're super excited to get updates rolling out to improve the game and add more features!

reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome, and me and my friend get very competitive. Over all, this game is pretty much perfect… I just have a few suggestions you could add.

To start, I think it would be awesome if there were some kind of missile launchers that could launch across the map with and you can control where it lands. But it should also  have a really long cool down time and some way to block them, like anti-missile guns. It would also be cool if there were different kinds of drones , like jet drones that can drop bombs, and fighters that you could send to destroy drones coming in. 
Please,please,please take these into consideration. And thanks for making such an awesome game!

developer_response.body: Glad you're having fun! You can craft bombers and flying scouts at the Airfield building, but we could definitely consider more types. The big missile sounds fun, we have a bit of action like that in the newly released Payload Pursuit mode, so definitely check that out!

reviews.review_description: Let me start by saying to the devs well done for a great game. I thoroughly enjoyed playing it today for the first time and I was really impressed in the amount of work put into the game, could I just had a few constructive comments, for starters I'd like to see more sound effects, noises from the base would had to the emersion, example the command tower sends out a laser beam when building, it would be great to put some kind of laser sound when doing this, also vehicle sounds on movement would be great, some do have sounds but not all, also the ai isn't aggressive at all? They seem to wait for you to attack them and doesn't create enough challenge. I know you're still adding to the game but I'm just giving a few ideas that you may have thought of anyway, this still gets 5 stars from me because its got the makings of a great game. Good luck devs Nice one.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, and the constructive feedback! We'll be chatting with our audio director soon about another pass on the sounds, and we will be adding AI difficulties (as well as fixing a few bugs with their behaviors) soon, which should scale up the challenge!

reviews.review_description:
Real-time Strategy has finally arrived on stand-alone!
It’s the best multiplayer experience I’ve had in a long time (even when playing the VR instead of the MR multiplayer mode).
It feels like playing Command and Conquer Red Alert in VR!
Build fast, discover the map with a jeep and attack when you think your ready!
Even without doing the tutorial we had a super fast learning curve. The menu systems are great, not to overwhelming with unnecessary messages. 
Point and click, drag and drop, select and attack all feels very natural.
Gonna visit my friend soon for some mixed reality local multiplayer battle, looking so much forward to that!
- If you got a friend that plays VR and also likes RTS, don’t consider, buy this game, you will love it.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review - so glad you're having fun! Hope the MR multiplayer is awesome when you try it with your friend!

reviews.review_title: Great RTS game, crisp and fun to play
reviews.review_description:
Campaign starts a bit slow but gets more difficult in acts 2 and 3. Missions are fun and engaging.

It took me a bit to get used to controls but once I did it became natural.

Would love to see more factions/units in the future and matchmaking for multilayer.

There are only few RTS games in VR. This one definitely worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and feedback - we really appreciate it! Glad that the controls clicked for you, it was quite a challenge to bring over a PC scheme to VR/MR! We're actively working on designs for more units, as well as a matchmaking system, and want to get those kinds of features added as soon as we can!

reviews.review_title: I like it except for one annoying little
reviews.review_description:
I really like it. The objects have shadows, which increases immersion, especially in MR, and the game plays smoothly. MR seems to be working well overall. I'm only on the third mission of the campaign, though.

What I don't like at all (campaign) : every minute, every current task (build this, do that) appears in the middle of my field of vision with a loud sound. 
I don't think anyone would miss that.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: 4/25 - In patch 1.42, we've added a menu option to turn off the objective reminders, based on your feedback!

Glad you're liking the game so far!

Feel free to join our Discord if you'd like to share more feedback: https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been waiting a long time for an MR game that lets you battle RTS style across your living room. The units look good, the game is very fun and I really enjoyed that the game uses your furniture as part of the game’s environment such as needing an elevator to get to a base on a table.

I would love to see this game continue to add new features and more depth like upgrading units/structures, more unit types and/or new factions.

Well done!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for trying the game, and leaving a review! So glad you're enjoying the MR mode! We're hearing lots of good feedback from players like you on upgrades and more units - would love to have you join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) to let us know more about what you'd like to see!

reviews.review_description:
The mixed reality feature is great but there are some points downgrading the total experience: 

- at the beginning of each mission, everything is placed randomly ( enemy base, ressources, points to capture,… 
This is basically  great as is different every time you start a mission 
 This results that after starting a mission, the enemy base or (well guarded) points to capture are right next to your base (in some missions you place your headquarter by yourself, but due to the “fog of war”/ line of sight, you don’t see where the enemy is when you place your headquarter. 
But also when your headquarter is already placed, this can happen. 
One mission is a “king of the hill” mode with 3 capture points. 
When you are lucky, 2 of them are close to your base and otherwise 2 can be close to the enemy base. 
This results in a “trial and error” 

- difficulty is very easy, but campaign needs some hours to be finished as it has 15 missions. The missions differ, some can be finished in some minutes and some need longer (~-5-30)   
Skirmish mode is not motivating because of low KI of enemies.
So after finishing the campaign missions, the long-term motivation ( single player) to continue with skirmish or repeat the campaign is very low ( although the missions would be little different due to different placement of units and buildings)

- Mixed reality feature can results in missworking pathfinding of own and enemy units 
(That reminds of the ore collectors from C&C Red Alert, so maybe its not a bug but a feature :) )
In some missions you have to capture a vehicle and return it to your base. 
It happend several times that due to not working pathfinding, I was not able to return the unit to my base and had to restart the mission (that happens nearly at the end of the mission, so the whole time  I played was wasted)

- if you want to play multiplayer, this is definitely a bigger value than only single player mode

developer_response.body: Really appreciate the detailed feedback! We have heard the need for more difficulty settings, and will be adding that in the near future! The MR mode especially will continue to be improved - it was quite an effort to get it all working, so we will be continuing to polish it up over time! Thanks so much for playing!

reviews.review_description:
First off, I want to say thanks for making this incredible game and I believe it to be a step forward for the whole VR genre of gaming. It's our time as RTS lovers, to stand strong and build the greatest community and most productive team of players to make this 5* game even better I would to like to see infantry I have made my suggestion and I believe it would be a game changer for me staying and playing this very long term also I would see this addition changing how we would all play the game which makes it more likely for all of us to return for a very long time example I still play command and conquer now all of them there years old we this to be like that a staple in the RTS world I am a vetren in the c&c online world played the top players years ago I was in a clan called general's this was amazing times 



Things I would love to see 



1. Lots more maps please



2. Add Infantry as discussed above in the discord 



3. Solid skermish mode for online play with a lot of options to change, like the amount of money you start with and so on. 



4. Also, 2 v 2 is a must and even 3 v 3 could be insane. 



5. the AI difficulties is a must for me and many others 



6. maybe some different skins to change the overall outlook of the maps and vehicles. This would be great. 



There will be more, but I'll add them in the correct place on discord. You guys have honestly filled a gap in the vr world. Now together let's make this game the best it could ever be. Thank devs you guys rock. 

👍🥇🎮👊

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review, and the detailed feedback! We'll see you around the Discord - many of these features are making their way onto the backlog as we speak!

reviews.review_description: This is exactly what I was looking for in a meta stand-alone RTS. It's like Starcraft, but less dark. The M.R is has been done masterfully, and the multi-level battlefield field creates a varied and tactical challenge. As many others have said, seeing the air units fly around your living room is truly awesome. There is plenty of content from different modes for skirmishs with the AI, campaign, and multiplayer. The controls are easy, intuitive, and accurate. I'm glad to hear that development is ongoing. This is already the best game I have brought to date, and it has so much more potential! Keep up the great work. You're making a masterpiece.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, and so glad you're enjoying the game! We love building for MR, and hope to add a lot more features to the game to continue to make it better!

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite kind of game BUT!
reviews.review_description: Now as far as my review the rating for this game if I could give it a 10 out of 10 I'd give it a 10 out of 10 this game is great The only thing personally I don't really care for the mixed reality so that doesn't really concern me The only thing I care about is the fact that in the game while you're playing your scouts only fine so many crystals on the map so if we update in the future it would be cool if you added more crystals on the map when your scouts are going out so that you have more time to collect more resources

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review, and glad you're liking the game! Appreciate the feedback on finding crystals - if you look closely, you can see some sparkles that show where more might be, so try sending your scouts to those spots first! We'll keep an eye on this though, and adjust spawn rates if needed.

reviews.review_description: If you are going to play together withought it glitching you need to play remote multiplayer. They also have 3 modes right now to play in, the only one that is good so far is the classic. When you do play together the orange/blue teams cars are more powerful then the red/black team. It's impossible to play together because the vehicles aren't balanced. The only cars that are good are the tanks and the artillery. They also need to add so you can upgrade your defenses, I've never played an RTS game were you couldn't.

developer_response.body: So sorry to hear you hit issues with the MR local multiplayer - we'd love to help debug this! If you'd like to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) and add a bug report, that would really help! The factions currently are equal in their costs/damage, other than the battering ram and flamethrower, but we're always looking to tune and balance  more. Definitely heard on the upgrade system - this is a feature we're starting to look at, as it's been highly requested. Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_title: Why is there so much fun?
reviews.review_description: This is a fun little game. It's great to command your army, move them around the room either in VR or MR, and sneak up on the enemy and blow them to pieces. Even when you can't see the enemy or you haven't found them yet, you can hear their drones and spacecraft flying around your head. My only complaint, is that the AI is too simple and the enemy is very easy to beat every single time. I wish there were harder levels.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! We are working on hard difficulty AI for VS modes now, and it should be coming out in a patch later this month! Feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) for all the latest updates!

reviews.review_description: It was a long road to launch, but super excited for everyone to finally get to play! Excited to hear everyone's feedback

Played the game solo and really enjoyed it. Setting up your base right in your own room in MR feels super cool and immersive. I also played in VR and it was as fun. The campaign has a good pace with plenty of variety missions and units to keep things interesting. The tutorial does a great job explaining everything, I was able to jump in and start building, scouting the crystals and battling without feeling lost. Looking forward to trying the multiplayer mode.

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying the game, and thank you for your review! Hope you have fun in multiplayer!

reviews.review_title: The best RTS game on the platform
reviews.review_description:
I've played enough of Crystal Commanders to get through most of the stuff the game has to offer, and I love it for how much it actually takes advantage of the fact you're playing in mixed reality.
The fact your base can be placed anywhere, and the enemy base could be placed anywhere, is really cool as an enemy base may be on top of your table and you would need an elevator to get your troopers out there to get to it.
My only complaint is that the troopers move really slowly in my big space. And sometimes my troopers would just not respond to my commands randomly. But other than that? This is a must have! I cannot wait to try the multiplayer function after I'm done playing the campaign.
If you're wondering if it's worth the money? I'd say "yes" if you like RTS games as there's enough to keep you occupied. If you're done with the campaign, you could always try your hand in online battles or use the creative mode to practice base layouts.
So all in all this is a great game and I'd totally recommend!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: 7/31/2025: We've added some additional options for VS matches that should help speed things up a bit for those bigger rooms!

Thanks so much for the review - so glad you're enjoying the MR mode! We've been thinking about having speed options in the menus to help with the challenge of bigger rooms. The control response we've been tracking on, and will keep making fixes to get that feeling as good as we know it needs to be! Feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) if you want to give more feedback or get updates on the post-launch development!

reviews.review_description: As someone who grew up obsessively playing Dune and Command  & Conquer, this game full fills that itch. The only issue I have is that the AI is entirely to easy to beat. It took me a few hours to complete all the missions. I am used to having a battle in RTS games take at least an hour to finish. I am really hopping that in the future they release different levels of difficulty for the AI, without this game is no longer playable for me. However if they do make the AI more difficult to fight, I will have to kiss my weekends and evenings goodbye.

developer_response.body: Glad you're liking the foundation of the game! AI difficulty is one of our top requested features, so we're hard at work on it already! Expect some new difficulties to be available soon, and then the ability to customize them in more fine tuned ways in the future. You can always check our posts or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) for updates!

reviews.review_title: Not a bad game but just not for me
reviews.review_description:
I’m a huge fan of RTS games since C&C and Warcraft 1. 

This game presses lot of the right buttons but didn’t care for the level design. Also Campaign is short and  I thought the characters were annoying.

Skirmish mode didn’t seem to be a lot of content either.

I don’t have Quest 3 so all the near mix reality features don’t appeal to me .

Maybe after some updates or dlc I may buy this game again .

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking out the game! We are working on some new updates as we speak, including a new VR map, and more features for skirmish, including AI difficulty settings. Would love to have you try out the game again in the future! You can keep an eye on the posts here, or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) for the latest!

reviews.review_description: One of the best RTS games on Meta Quest, featuring fully voiced characters and a campaign mode. Playable in both MR and VR, it's a highly polished experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - really glad you're enjoying the campaign! It was so fun to design all those characters - excited to see what else we can do with them!

reviews.review_description: Awesome little game, new update that is coming is going to make this game even better than it already is. 100% totally recommend picking this one up! 👌

developer_response.body: So glad you're liking it, and thanks so much for the review!

reviews.review_description:
I like the idea of a VR RTS game and the mixed reality mode is very good but there are a few changes that I think should be made for it to become a five-star 
 First the maps should be something that fits with the general theme of the game and the story is trying to portray. This would actually be very easy because technically speaking all you would need to do is make a scaled up version of all the areas on the map where you select the level and retexture them.
 Also could use a little more variety on what you can build and spawn and possibly a way to upgrade buildings. 
 Overall it looks good so far and I think it has great potential but for now I'm going to refund it so I can buy some other games that I have been looking at for a while now keep up the good work and I'll check in in a few months to see if I want to buy it again. 🙂

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: 7/31/2025: We have added a total of 3 VR terrain maps that are based on the world of the game, as well as 2 additional unit types, and more!

So glad you enjoyed the MR mode - it was so interesting to have to invent new ways of doing things to make it possible! We are actively working on some more terrain style maps - posted a sneak peek of the first one in our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa). We're also working on more unit types and systems, though they will take a bit more time to design and integrate. Really appreciate you giving the game a chance, and hopefully it will be worthy of your full purchase when you check back in!

reviews.review_title: Love the game, but first issue found
reviews.review_description: Love the first mission, I am excited to see what you all have made!!, but I did notice that the mixed reality doesn't work yet, it kept giving me errors when scanning the room, but I'm sure that will be fixed!, love the game

developer_response.body: What is the error you are getting? Feel free to reach out on the Discord or support@dbcreations.studio and we can help troubleshoot

reviews.review_description:
I used to play StarCraft a lot, and I was hoping to get a StarCraft-like game in quest. Couldn’t find one until now! The simplicity of this game is much appreciated to get onboarded, and I’m looking forward to spend more hours to master elements of the game. I’m hoping we can get a thriving multiplayer community to have some awesome battles. 

Good work dev team!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, and we greatly appreciate the review! We're working on designs for an in game matchmaking system of some kind, which should help you find new players to battle, but our Discord has an LFG channel that you can check out as well.

reviews.review_description: I'm having really fun with this game however it would be nice if there was a difficulty mode when playing against AI as they don't really attack your base it just seems one-sided. Also I think it will be a good idea to have an option in mixed reality mode where you can see the blue outline of your area so you know exactly where you can place stuff.

developer_response.body:
The issue where it selects the wrong room should be fixed in the latest patch, so it would be helpful if you could try that again.

Can you share some examples with us of objects spawning inside of parts of your room? You can share that via email at contact@dbcreations.studio or our Discord

reviews.review_description: I saw the trailer and I didn't know what to expect. But when I started to put my troops around and still have a war going on like I'll play with toys as a kid. The game brought back great memories, and I think it's an experience everyone should have.This is showing us the direction of the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for checking out the game, and so glad to hear you are enjoying it! We really appreciate the review!

reviews.review_description: Very polished RTS game with a really fun mixed reality mode. There is a slight lack of units and buildings, but as it's a new release I can understand that. AI is fun to play against, Campaign does a good job at explaining everything. 5/5

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Glad the campaign was clear for you - we spent a lot of time working on the pacing! Appreciate the feedback on unit and building types - we'd love to have you join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) and let us know more about what you'd like to see!

reviews.review_description: I was curious, but I was not excited about this game. I regret my lack of enthusiasm. This is a fantastic use of MR. It's also simply a lot of fun. This is already on my list of top 5 games ever.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for checking out the game, we're so glad you found something you love! We are hard at work on more content and updates - feel free to join our Discord server (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) to keep up with the latest!

reviews.review_description: I am a big RTS lover and have played many! I never got to experience being IN an RTS scenario though, this is really next level stuff, The team have done an amazing job with this, in addition they have been focused on requests and updates, a service you just don't get in even triple a games, highly recommend to any RTS lovers and new players to the genre. Good job team!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review, and really appreciate your feedback so far! Hoping we can keep adding to the game and make it even better!

reviews.review_title: I wish multiplayer would be better
reviews.review_description: I wish they had a lobby or something. No one seems to match on the random.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate the review! We're actively discussing lobby systems or other solutions to help out here now that we were able to add matchmaking. Stay tuned, and feel free to hang out in our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) for the latest updates!

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I had hoped for
reviews.review_description: A third of the price of Civ 7 but 300% more fun to play. Thanks for this MR milestone

developer_response.body: Glad we could deliver what you were hoping for! RTS gameplay and MR just make sense together!

reviews.review_description:
I got to play it once and it was very nice. Likely one of the best apps on the quest. But any time since that first launch, it won't load. It just sits at the splash screen that shows the company names on the bottom and doesn't go anywhere from there. How can this be fixed?

Update: Spoke to the developers and figured out what is going on. It's a new game with a few bugs to work out but definitely one of the cooler games I've run across and work a try.

developer_response.body:
Hi daulphin,

Sorry to hear you are hitting this issue. Are you trying to enter from VR or MR? If from MR, try entering from VR and let me know if that fixes the issue. The other potential issue it could be is that if you have set your Quest to record at non-default aspect ratios, we have seen bugs around that.

reviews.review_description: Good game but the only problem I have with it is only two players can play at a time, I want to be able to play with more people at one time like up to 6 or smth not only doing 1v1s. Other than that the games great

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for playing the game, and we really appreciate the feedback! We're looking into adding additional players to battles in a future patch - feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) to stay up to date and chat about other improvements we could make!

reviews.review_description: Really enjoying the game, it's very fun too play. I have only played skirmish mode so far, but find that too easy even on hard. Hopefully we can get some harder levels at some point.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! We are planning to keep increasing AI difficulty until it's hard enough - our next update (2.0) will have some improvements! Feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) to give more detailed feedback if you'd like!

reviews.review_description: Having multiplayer in VR makes it so much more fun

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying the multiplayer, and thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: Reminds me of Command and conquer really enjoying it ￼

developer_response.body: So glad you're having fun! C&C is one of our favorites, and a major inspiration for the game!

reviews.review_description: I installed the game and did one match against a bot and I was BLOWN AWAY!! It was incredible to play in my own apartment and see the battle take place. Already has amazing content and the devs are very active so it’ll just get better. A fantastic title!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, it helps us out immensely! So glad you're enjoying the MR battles - we are excited about adding much more to the game!

reviews.review_title: had this 60 yr old guy on the floor
reviews.review_description: I found myself on the floor playing like a younger me with my little tanks and army men. I did some AI games to get the feel for it and really enjoyed it. The multiplayer looks good yet the movement style isn't good and made me dizzy with the created environment. I'll try again and see if I can adjust it out. I had a thought about using hand tracking instead of the controllers. I could touch fingertip to thumb to select a building on one hand and tanks and things with the other. Then I could pinch the object to pick it up and place it..  few things I thought would add a little more immersion and create a more natural interaction. I was all smiles while bombing my enemy into oblivion! Great game.

developer_response.body: So glad you had fun playing! Sorry to hear the VR locomotion isn't working great for you - we have both direct movement as well as teleporting, so definitely check the settings and make sure you're using the one that's best for you. Hand controls are interesting, something we have been thinking about as well for the future possibly.

reviews.review_description: You should download this game because it’s really good and the music is really really good but it’s a really good game overall

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, we really appreciate the review!

reviews.review_description: I like it. I beat the solo campaign in 1 day though.  That's normal for meta quest games I guess.   I wish the multi player had random matching capabilities.   Then I'd give it 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE 6/23/2025: Happy to share that we have added in a matchmaking system to the game, to help you find random players to battle! We'll be making more improvements to the system in a future update, including a lobby system.

Thanks so much for the review and feedback! We're working on adding matchmaking now, and it should come out in a free update later in May! Feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/UzrFjFa) to stay up on the latest - we also have an LFG channel there to find folks to play with in the meantime!

reviews.review_description:
Hella fun shout to the devs giving me
 old-school general chaos vibes.  However would it be possible  to add a world scale so I can take my size from micromachine to an actual car model

developer_response.body: Glad you like the game, and thanks for the review! That's a fun idea - something we could consider for the future!

reviews.review_description: Really fun to play. And great mixed reality use. Highly recommend. Well done dev team 👏

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for playing, and leaving a review! So glad you enjoyed the MR mode, we're so proud of it!

reviews.review_description: Absolut genial!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, and we really appreciate the review!
